title: banalia humilis
intro: Banalia humilis, also known as creeping thyme, is a low-growing, herbaceous perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Banalia humilis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Banalia humilis can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or added to soups and stews, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for herbal remedies.
